buildCommand: git clone https://github.com/flutter/flutter.git --depth 1 -b 3.44.2 _flutter && ./_flutter/bin/flutter config --enable-web && ./_flutter/bin/flutter build web --release --no-tree-shake-icons --dart-define=EMAILJS_SERVICE_ID=$EMAILJS_SERVICE_ID --dart-define=EMAILJS_TEMPLATE_ID=$EMAILJS_TEMPLATE_ID --dart-define=EMAILJS_PUBLIC_KEY=$EMAILJS_PUBLIC_KEY
